_comment: Per-property controls. 'monitor'=false skips the property entirely (no scraping, no file/MongoDB writes, no emails). 'email'=false keeps scraping so the website + files + MongoDB stay current, but sends NO emails for that property. Missing groups/properties/flags default to true (monitored + emailing), so this file can never silently break tracking. Keys must match spruce/scraper/config.py GROUPS (group key -> property key).
